rag_rules: Fix AGREE expression type mismatches by ensuring boolean expressions are used in assume/guarantee statements
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by validating visible identifiers and helper declarations
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared auxiliary variables in AGREE contracts
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for output bindings
Validate expression types to match expected boolean or numeric types in AGREE contracts
Trace unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations to fix type errors in AGREE clauses
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE assume/guarantee expressions must evaluate to boolean type
Use 'eq' for auxiliary variable declarations in AGREE contracts
Assign statements should reference existing output features or declared variables
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for output bindings
Do not use numeric expressions where boolean expressions are required in assume/guarantee
